name: Moodle
description: Moodle is an open-source learning management system used worldwide by universities, schools, and training organizations. Its Web Services API allows external applications to manage courses, users, grades, assignments, enrolments, messages, and calendar events programmatically via REST.

auth.note: The base URL varies per Moodle installation. Replace {your-moodle-site} with your actual Moodle domain. Tokens are generated in Site Administration > Server > Web services > Manage tokens.

capabilities.name: users_create
capabilities.description: Create one or more new users in the Moodle database.

capabilities.name: users_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve user profiles by field criteria such as ID, username, or email.

capabilities.name: users_update
capabilities.description: Update one or more existing user profiles.

capabilities.name: users_delete
capabilities.description: Delete one or more users from the Moodle database.

capabilities.name: users_search
capabilities.description: Search for users matching specific criteria with filtering.

capabilities.name: courses_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all courses available on the Moodle site.

capabilities.name: courses_get_by_field
capabilities.description: Retrieve courses matching a specific field value.

capabilities.name: courses_create
capabilities.description: Create one or more new courses in Moodle.

capabilities.name: courses_get_contents
capabilities.description: Retrieve the full content structure of a course including sections and activities.

capabilities.name: courses_update
capabilities.description: Update one or more existing courses.

capabilities.name: courses_delete
capabilities.description: Delete one or more courses from the Moodle site.

capabilities.name: categories_create
capabilities.description: Create one or more course categories.

capabilities.name: categories_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve course categories matching given criteria.

capabilities.name: enrolments_enrol
capabilities.description: Enrol users into a course with a specified role.

capabilities.name: enrolments_unenrol
capabilities.description: Unenrol users from a course.

capabilities.name: enrolments_get_enrolled_users
capabilities.description: Get all users enrolled in a specific course.

capabilities.name: enrolments_get_users_courses
capabilities.description: Get all courses a specific user is enrolled in.

capabilities.name: grades_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve grade items and final grades for users in a course.

capabilities.name: grades_update
capabilities.description: Update grade values for users in a course.

capabilities.name: assignments_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all assignments for one or more courses.

capabilities.name: assignments_get_submissions
capabilities.description: Retrieve all submissions for a specific assignment.

capabilities.name: messages_send
capabilities.description: Send instant messages to one or more users.

capabilities.name: messages_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve messages for a conversation between users.

capabilities.name: calendar_events_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve calendar events optionally filtered by course.

capabilities.name: calendar_events_create
capabilities.description: Create one or more calendar events.

capabilities.name: files_upload
capabilities.description: Upload a file to the Moodle draft area.

capabilities.name: site_info_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve information about the Moodle site including version and capabilities.
